name: seqviz

en.when_to_use: Use it for molecular-biology/genetic-engineering visualization: plasmid maps, cloning/construct design, and annotated gene sequences. Supply a seq string plus an annotations array, and choose linear|circular|both|both_flip for viewer. Use it instead of hand-written SVG for circular plasmid maps and base-level zoom; a table is enough for a plain residue grid. Under strict CSP, always set disableExternalFonts:true (otherwise it fetches Roboto Mono from Google Fonts and injects a link into head).
en.why_valuable: This DNA/RNA/protein sequence viewer renders both linear and circular (plasmid) views with curved feature arrows around the ring, restriction sites, primers, translations/ORFs, base-level zoom, and GenBank/FASTA parsing. Hand-drawing a circular plasmid map (arc math, arrows on curves, and non-overlapping annotation rings) is highly error-prone for native AI, which also cannot parse GenBank or provide interactive base-level selection.

data_in.note: Use vanilla Viewer(element, options).render(); element may be an id string or a real HTMLElement (including in shadow). annotations uses start/end plus direction(1|-1|0). style applies to the outermost div--give it a px height and prohibit vh (the README's 100vh is a counterexample).

schema.name?: string -- name at the center of the circular view
schema.disableExternalFonts?: boolean -- set true in a CSP environment
schema.style?: object -- applied to the outermost div, such as {height:'400px',width:'100%'}

spec.note: Viewer needs a sized container; give both the container and style.height px values. vh/percentage height is prohibited.

when_to_use: 分子生物学/基因工程可视化:质粒图、克隆/构建设计、带注释基因序列。给 seq 字符串 + annotations 数组,viewer 选 linear|circular|both|both_flip。要环形质粒图、碱基级缩放时用它替代手写 SVG;纯残基网格用表格即可。严格 CSP 下务必置 disableExternalFonts:true(否则会从 Google Fonts 拉 Roboto Mono 并向 head 注入 link)。
why_valuable: DNA/RNA/蛋白序列查看器,同时渲染线性与环形(质粒)图:环上曲线特征箭头、酶切位点、引物、翻译/ORF、碱基级缩放,并解析 GenBank/FASTA。手绘环形质粒图(弧线数学、曲线上的箭头、不重叠注释环)对原生 AI 极易出错,且它不会解析 GenBank 或做碱基级交互选择。

data_in.note: vanilla Viewer(element, options).render();element 可为 id 字符串或真实 HTMLElement(可落 shadow)。annotations 用 start/end + direction(1|-1|0)。style 施于最外层 div——给 px 高,禁 vh(README 用 100vh 是反例)。

schema.style?: object —— 施于最外层 div,如 {height:'400px',width:'100%'}

spec.note: Viewer 需要有尺寸的容器;容器与 style.height 都给 px。禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: annotation 用 start/end/direction(非 from/to),minimal 钉死本库字段;viewer 决定线性/环形。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;选择/点击若需外传,消费 AI 直接接 onSelection(selection)=>void 回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:Viewer 接受 HTMLElement 落 shadow;disableExternalFonts:true 免 head 字体;copy 助手仅在复制事件时瞬时触碰 body

isolation.evidence: +esm named exports Viewer (nt) + SeqViz (React) + default (M). dist/index.browser.d.ts: Viewer(element:(string|HTMLElement)|undefined, options:SeqVizProps)=>{render():ReactElement, setState()} — element accepts a real HTMLElement, so it mounts into a shadow div. SeqVizProps (dist/SeqViz.d.ts): seq?, name?, annotations?:AnnotationProp[]{name,start,end,direction,color}, viewer?:'linear'|'circular'|'both'|'both_flip', seqType?:'dna'|'rna'|'aa', enzymes?, translations?, highlights?, disableExternalFonts?, style?:Record — schema matches exactly. +esm self-resolves react@19.2.7, react-dom@19.2.7/client, @lattice-automation/react-resize-detector@12.3.0, so vanilla Viewer needs no manual React. globalStyleInjection=conditional: bundle references webfontloader to load 'Roboto Mono' from Google Fonts (injects a font link into head) UNLESS disableExternalFonts:true — boot always sets it. globalDomMutation=yes but transient: a `document.body.appendChild(o); o.select()` copy/measure helper (grep: document.body x2) fires on copy, not on mount. globalEvents=no at document level (react-dom 19 createRoot attaches listeners to the provided root container). shadowCompatible=conditional: renders into the provided shadow element; set disableExternalFonts:true.
